actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A six-tonne tribute to the airmen of Bomber Command who died in World War Two has been dedicated at Beachy Head.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: One person has died and another has been injured in a crash on the M40.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Cardiff Blues have appointed Matt Sherratt as their new attack coach.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A sheepdog cross required emergency surgery after a toy arrow became wedged in her stomach.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Vladislav Pomozov has been charged with murder and the attempted murder of a second man after Andrejs Trofimovics was stabbed to death in Bournemouth.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Met Office has issued a yellow weather warning of fog for Wednesday evening.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Denbighshire, Flintshire, Wrexham, Powys, Blaenau Gwent, Caerphilly, Monmouthshire, Torfaen, Cardiff, Newport and Vale of Glamorgan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: South Wales Police say that they will not be taking any further action after an attack on a 17-year-old in Gabalfa.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Nearly 200 unaccompanied minors were rescued from a boat carrying 720 migrants off the coast of Italy.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Robbie Brady scored a late header to give the Republic of Ireland a 1-0 victory over Italy and qualification for the last 16 of the European Championship.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Northampton Town are promoted to League One after a 1-0 victory over Oxford United.
